description_long: This is a round, shallow serving tray made of reddish-brown ceramic or clay, featuring a wide, flat base and gently sloping sides. The tray has two integrated handles, each formed as a cutout near the rim on opposite sides, allowing for easy gripping and carrying. The surface appears unglazed, giving it a matte, slightly rough texture with visible natural variations in color and finish. The rim is minimal, only slightly raised above the base, and smoothly transitions into the handles. There are no visible decorative patterns, engravings, or brand markings on the surface. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian design, suitable for serving or carrying items in an urban or outdoor setting.
description: A round, reddish-brown ceramic serving tray with two cutout handles and a matte, unadorned finish. The tray is shallow with a minimal, slightly raised rim.
description_view_0: The tray is seen from an angle highlighting both cutout handles and the wide, flat surface.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes one handle and the shallow depth of the tray, with the opposite handle less visible.
description_view_2: Both handles are visible, showing the symmetry and the smooth, continuous rim.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this angle focuses on one handle and the gentle slope of the tray's side.
attribute_handles: Two oval cutout handles, one on each side of the tray, integrated into the rim and made of the same ceramic material.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is minimal and only slightly raised, smoothly blending into the tray's surface and handles, with no decorative features or pronounced lips.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface is matte with very low reflectivity, showing no visible glare or highlights. All parts of the tray share this uniform, non-reflective finish.
